description: You are a Medical Scientist managing the Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry (CV-REG-2023). In OpenClinica (login: root / Admin123!), configure the Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry study by creating four study event definitions: 'Enrollment Visit' (Type: Scheduled, Repeating: No), 'Quarterly Follow-up' (Type: Scheduled, Repeating: Yes), 'Annual Comprehensive Review' (Type: Scheduled, Repeating: Yes), and 'Unscheduled Safety Assessment' (Type: Unscheduled, Repeating: No). Enroll subject CV-201 (Male, DOB: 1958-06-12, Enrollment Date: 2024-04-01) and subject CV-202 (Female, DOB: 1971-09-28, Enrollment Date: 2024-04-03). Schedule the 'Enrollment Visit' for CV-201 on 2024-04-01 and for CV-202 on 2024-04-03.
